title: delve and golang bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
delve
[1.24.1-2.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.24.1-2]
- Rebuild without changes

golang
[1.24.6-1]
- Update to Go 1.24.6

[1.24.4-3]
- Re enable debuginfo in toolchain binaries

[1.24.4-2]
- Add LD_FLAGS for stripping binaries
full_text:
delve
[1.24.1-2.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.24.1-2]
- Rebuild without changes

golang
[1.24.6-1]
- Update to Go 1.24.6

[1.24.4-3]
- Re enable debuginfo in toolchain binaries

[1.24.4-2]
- Add LD_FLAGS for stripping binaries
